parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Bit Depth: Lowers the bit depth of the block for a grungier sound. For more transparent results, set to 24 bits.
parameters-en.Sample Rate: Lowers the sample rate of the block for a grungier, more vintage digital sound. For more transparent results, set to 48kHz.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the block, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the block, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the affected signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no effected signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Open: Sets the level above which the built-in noise gate "opens," or passes signal through.
parameters-en.Close: Sets the level below which the built-in noise gate "closes," or stops signal from passing through.
parameters-en.Hold Time: Adjusts the length of time after the signal drops below the Close threshold before it is gated. Increase Hold Time if your playing is chopped off too soon.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls the length of time it takes for the open noise gate to close once the signal drops below the Close level/threshold.
